message:
feat: add signal processing conformance test suite

Add differential tests for window functions (bartlett, blackman, hamming,
hanning, kaiser) and signal processing functions (gradient, diff, ediff1d,
cross, trapezoid). 14 golden output test cases with NumPy-verified expected
values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
